Michael Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated forklift operator with over 4 years of experience in warehouse settings. Skilled in operating both reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts. Committed to maintaining safety standards and optimizing warehouse operations. Proficient in warehouse management systems (WMS) with a proven track record of efficiency and accuracy.

Experience
Forklift Operator  
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA  
June 2020 - Present  
- Operated reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to move materials around the warehouse.  
- Conducted daily safety inspections on equipment to ensure compliance with OSHA regulations.  
- Assisted in inventory management using WMS to track stock levels and improve order fulfillment processes.  
- Collaborated with team members to streamline loading and unloading procedures, reducing turnaround time by 20%.

Warehouse Associate  
XYZ Distribution, Marietta, GA  
January 2018 - May 2020  
- Worked in a fast-paced environment performing manual tasks and operating forklifts.  
- Gained experience with warehouse management systems to assist in inventory tracking and reporting.  
- Responsible for maintaining a clean and organized workspace, ensuring safety protocols were followed.

Certifications
- OSHA Forklift Operator Certification (Class I, IV, V)  
- Certified Reach Truck Operator  

Skills
- Forklift Operation (Reach Truck, Counterbalance)  
- Warehouse Management Systems (WMS)  
- Safety Compliance  
- Inventory Management  
- Team Collaboration

Education
High School Diploma  
Atlanta High School, Atlanta, GA
